# Pael's Tears

**[STUB]** Local page added from Pael live run data; verify against source when rebuilding the KB.

## Description

If you end your turn with unspent Energy, gain 2 additional Energy next turn.

---

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Best for decks that regularly float energy; less reliable in low-curve attack decks that usually spend all energy each turn.
